rationale: The citing paper references Stephen and Galak (2012) only in the general discussion to note that some forms of social media can increase sales. It is not used to derive hypotheses, set up the experimental design, define constructs, or interpret the paper's main first- and second-order causal tests about Facebook brand liking. The citation serves as broad contextual background and a caveat against overgeneralizing the null results, not as a core building block.
